items.title: A - Skybreaker
items.medium: Hydrocal carved etching with mixed media (watercolor, acrylic ink, acrylic, watercolor pencil, ink) on wood
items.description: Altensien Skybreaker, having traversed the full Path of the Infinite Dream, reaches the Cosmos and picks up the black cube held in the distance. This figure represents the culmination of transformation, the body reshaped through every archetypal state. Developed through multiple iterations of Skybreaker and automatic blindfold drawing, which served as the structural study for the piece.

items.title: Reconfiguration
items.medium: Mixed media (watercolor, watercolor pens, acrylic ink, acrylic, watercolor pencil, ink) on wood
items.description: Altensien Skybreaker is absorbed into the cube. An abstracted, allegorical representation of how the six archetypes: The Fall, The Void, The Cloud, The Lightning, The Star, and The Cosmos invoke a transformation of fluidity and change, pulling Skybreaker into the infinite. Developed through blind drawing, automatism, and notes processing.

items.title: The Fall
items.medium: Mixed media (watercolor, watercolor pens, acrylic ink, acrylic, watercolor pencil, ink) on wood
items.description: The first state of The Path of the Infinite Dream. Altensien Skybreaker enters a portal and descends into an interior space, both cosmic and enclosed. Surrounded by cubes containing stories, galaxies, and fragments of other realities, a single cube makes contact with the body. The result is descent: the body spiraling downward under pressure and gravity, flames erupting from the flesh, darkness pulling endlessly below. The color is red, the color of heat, blood, and the interior of the body before it is opened.

items.title: The Void
items.medium: Mixed media (watercolor, watercolor pens, acrylic ink, acrylic, watercolor pencil, ink) on wood
items.description: The second state of The Path of the Infinite Dream. Altensien Skybreaker reaches the Void as a cube extends outward, pulling them inside. Clouds seep in, consuming and changing Skybreaker from the outside inward. A boxed-in black space, enclosed, watching, still, with eyes observing from all sides, translucent walls, no visible exit. The self is confronted with its own interior, unable to look away. The color is purple, held and compressed.

items.title: The Cloud
items.medium: Mixed media (watercolor, watercolor pens, acrylic ink, acrylic, watercolor pencil, ink) on wood
items.description: The third state of The Path of the Infinite Dream. Altensien Skybreaker, now made entirely of clouds, stands with the chest broken open. A heart made of clouds emerges and calls out, not in language, but in the way emotion speaks: directly, without translation. Skybreaker must understand what the heart is saying before anything can continue. Understanding forms the way weather forms, diffuse, surrounding, environmental. The color is blue, expansive and atmospheric.

items.title: The Lightning
items.medium: Mixed media (watercolor, watercolor pens, acrylic ink, acrylic, watercolor pencil, ink) on wood
items.description: The fourth state of The Path of the Infinite Dream. The moment understanding is reached, the strike is immediate and total. The body is broken open and struck repeatedly, disintegrating into black, electricity coursing through the flesh. The structure of the body begins to resemble swirling galaxies, matter reorganized by force rather than intention. A core emerges where the right hand would be. The Lightning does not destroy. It reconfigures. The color is yellow, electric and sharp.

items.title: The Star
items.medium: Mixed media (watercolor, watercolor pens, acrylic ink, acrylic, watercolor pencil, ink) on wood
items.description: The fifth state of The Path of the Infinite Dream. Altensien is pulled into a galactic nebula, rays of light piercing the body from every direction. The Star becomes a portal, the body passes through it and is transformed, now rendered entirely in black, made of liquid galaxy, stars forming upward from the feet. The self is recognized as energy rather than matter, no longer bounded by the form it once held. The color is orange, burning and radiant.

items.title: The Cosmos
items.medium: Mixed media (watercolor, watercolor pens, acrylic ink, acrylic, watercolor pencil, ink) on wood
items.description: The sixth and final state of The Path of the Infinite Dream. Altensien Skybreaker, now a body of liquid galaxy, walks the Cosmos. Movement slows. Footsteps shape energy. In the distance, two hands made of darkness hold a black cube, spiraling smoke and clouds pouring from it, the entrance to the Infinity Planes. The cycle begins again.

items.title: The Infinity Planes (Map)
items.medium: Mixed media (watercolor, watercolor pens, acrylic ink, acrylic, watercolor pencil, ink) on wood
items.description: Developed through multiple iterations where spilled paint and intuitive mark-making gave shape to an evolving internal realm. The Infinity Planes (Map) is an ongoing work, a living document of a self-created universe. A hand molds cubes, recycling them into dreams, narrative, and myth. Souls walk across clouds and a galactic lake. This is the pool of souls: a realm that will continue to expand and evolve as the mythology grows.
